displayTitle: Five Steps to a Permanent Record

beats.narration: In manual processing you are the machine. Five steps stand between the latent image and a permanent record: develop, stop, fix, wash, dry.

payload.title: MANUAL PROCESSING
payload.sub: The image is only as repeatable as your habits.

beats.narration: Never develop by sight. The time temperature method: five minutes at 68 degrees Fahrenheit. Longer when the bath runs cooler, shorter when warmer.

payload.heading: The time-temperature method
payload.note: 5 MIN AT 68 °F · COOLER LONGER · WARMER SHORTER

beats.narration: Each bath has one job: developer turns exposed grains to black silver, acid stop halts it instantly, fixer dissolves the unexposed halide.
Your habits keep it honest: agitate about every minute, replenish the chemistry, wash twenty to thirty minutes, finish with wetting agent, no water spots.

payload.heading: Your habits keep the line honest

beats.narration: Every step has a time, a temperature, and a reason. Honor all three, and the process rewards the careful, every single time.
